response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and domains, meeting the core technical bar of 8+ years and language proficiency. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or large-scale telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the central focus of this Principal/IC6 role. Title progression is mostly Senior/Staff at smaller companies rather than Principal-level scope across multi-team initiatives at enterprise scale.
strengths: Long tenure with diverse production experience across web, backend, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of req/sec)
Polyglot proficiency including JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C, C++, and D — aligned with the role's language requirements
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout/risk-control systems
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope: leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams at enterprise scale
Light signal on data aptitude, statistical methods, and metrics/telemetry platform building central to this role

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering background with scale experience
Seniority/scope mismatch versus Principal IC6 expectations
